name: loop-finder
description: Loop discovery + race + feature-driven iteration. Two skills: loop-finder (engineers a self-verifiable gate for a task class, races parallel variants, converges on the best loop config; HITL concentrated at permission boundaries) and feature-cycle (outer queued-fix chain that ships features against the converged gate, retros pain, queues one harness fix per cycle — Karpathy autoresearch discipline applied to dev experience).
